$comment: Task manifest for run-kz-2026-07-14. Each task maps a spec agent role to a concrete unit of work. Statuses: not_checked | in_progress | done | blocked | owner_review_required. This is a plan, not results.

tasks.description: Country baseline: regulators (AFSA/AIFC, NBK), registers, legal regime, banks (Kaspi, Halyk), payment methods, languages
ToS/eligibility/restricted-countries/KYC/fiat/P2P/app/affiliate rules — 7 minimum official sources per exchange
tasks.note: 2026-07-14: restricted-countries/eligibility verified fresh for 5/6 (bybit via in-window Sprint 8B capture — site blocks fetch); AFSA warning + Bybit license captured. Remaining: KYC docs, fiat/P2P pages, app listings, affiliate terms per exchange.

tasks.description: Proxied read-only tests via scripts/verify-geo-bonus.mjs (--country=kazakhstan): registration page, country selector, promo landing, code visibility
iOS + Android local availability, publisher, rank, review signals
Branded/intent query demand in kk/ru/en incl. transliteration; classify intents
KZT P2P snapshots (USDT/BTC/USDC × BUY/SELL × Kaspi/Halyk/bank) at 3 time slots
Telegram/YouTube/forums real-use evidence, classified; affiliate content excluded
KZT deposit/withdrawal matrix incl. Kaspi/Halyk, cards, transfers
/go/ route behaviour from KZ, final domain, code visibility, bonus claim match, affiliate GEO terms
Locally relevant fees (P2P first, then spot/futures/withdrawal)
PoR, incident history, enforcement, entity transparency

tasks.note: 2026-07-14: first real ledgers created under evidence/ (15 evidence objects, 30 claims, 3 conflicts, 8 unknowns); grows as kz-t02+ complete.

tasks.description: Resolve or mark UNCERTAIN; e.g. bitget ToS-prohibited vs observed P2P activity
Challenge ranking per spec Phase 10 checklist
Editorial from approved claims only + final QA + publish-or-block
